files.content:
---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"details"> {}

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<details data-slot="collapsible" class={cn(className)} {...props}>
  <slot />
</details>
--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"div"> {} const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"summary"> {}

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<summary
  data-slot="collapsible-trigger"
  class={cn("list-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden", className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</summary>

export { default as Collapsible } from "./collapsible.astro"
export { default as CollapsibleContent } from "./collapsible-content.astro"
export { default as CollapsibleTrigger } from "./collapsible-trigger.astro"
